current_internal_benchmark.direct_fit_reading: the next cohort must combine dense repeated burden with stronger raw nightly support than IFH; strong raw alone is not enough

targets.name: Brigham and Women's Hospital — Division of Sleep and Circadian Disorders
targets.exact_ask: one cohort with participant-night rows, repeated stress or closely related burden, raw or epoch cardiovascular sidecars, and enough metadata to estimate raw night fraction plus mean raw coverage before transfer

targets.name: Stanford Medicine — Center for Sleep and Circadian Sciences
targets.exact_ask: longitudinal nightly sleep plus HR/HRV or wearable physiology with stress-style endpoints and a credible estimate of raw-night support before any bundle request

targets.name: Northwestern Medicine / Feinberg — Center for Circadian & Sleep Medicine
targets.exact_ask: one cohort that can clear the current dual-frontier pre-screen, not a general collaboration

targets.name: Hospital Clínic Barcelona — Unit of Sleep Research
targets.exact_ask: participant-night export plus repeated stress, mood, or symptom burden, a credible raw-support estimate, and an optional PSG or biomarker subset

targets.name: Scripps Research — Digital Trials Center
targets.exact_ask: one remote cohort export with nightly sleep, HR or activity, repeated burden, timestamps that survive harmonization, and enough facts to estimate raw night fraction plus mean raw coverage

targets.name: Duke University Population Research Institute — RAISE / mobile stress study line
targets.exact_ask: repeated stress-linked wearable cohort preserving participant-day or participant-night linkage, with heart rate, sleep quality, movement, timestamps, and enough detail to complete the dual-frontier pre-screen

targets.name: Oura for Research
targets.exact_ask: one prospective pilot with nightly sleep timing, HR or HRV, repeated burden, and planned reporting dense enough to clear the preferred outcome floor

targets.name: Empatica — Research / platform route
targets.exact_ask: one prospective bundle with raw or epoch HR/IBI, repeated stress, stable sleep-window linkage, and a design that should clear both raw-support benchmarks

targets.name: Withings Health Solutions
targets.exact_ask: one pilot with nightly sleep summaries, timestamps, repeated stress or symptom burden, and a route to richer cardiovascular exports if retrospective access stalls
